name: Click Boarding
tagline: Automated onboarding and employee lifecycle management platform
description: Click Boarding is an employee lifecycle management platform that automates onboarding, offboarding, and every transition in between. Its AI-powered platform ensures compliance with I-9, E-Verify, and state-specific requirements while creating engaging employee experiences. Click Boarding integrates with major HCM systems to eliminate duplicate data entry and streamline new hire paperwork.
